description_long: This is a sealed, air-filled bag of Doritos Nacho Cheese flavored tortilla chips, featuring a vibrant red background with bold white and black branding on the front. The front side displays the Doritos logo in large, stylized white letters with a black and orange triangular motif, accompanied by an image of two triangular, orange-hued chips. The back of the bag includes a nutrition facts panel, additional branding, and a smaller image of the chips. The packaging is made of glossy, flexible plastic, which is slightly crinkled and puffed due to the air inside. The sides of the bag are narrow and show the seam where the packaging is sealed. The overall appearance is typical of a single-serving snack bag commonly found in urban environments such as convenience stores, vending machines, or carried by pedestrians.
description: A glossy, red plastic bag of Doritos Nacho Cheese chips with bold branding and chip imagery on the front, and nutritional information on the back. The bag is air-filled, crinkled, and sealed at the top and bottom.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Doritos logo, Nacho Cheese flavor text, and two triangular chips against a red background.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the narrow seam of the bag and a partial view of the nutrition facts panel.
description_view_2: The back view displays the nutrition facts panel, additional branding, and a smaller image of the chips.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the seam and a partial view of the front and back graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The Doritos logo is prominently displayed on the front and back, featuring bold white letters with a black and orange triangular outline.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag clearly states 'Nacho Cheese' flavor in white and orange text, with images of orange cheese-flavored chips.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of the bag, listing calories and other nutritional information.
